sections.changelog:
1.9.0

Multi-count habits: a habit can require several completions per day. Edit Habit gains a "Times per day" field (1–9); `habit_entries.done` is now the day's completion count (schema widened to INT via the version-bump self-heal, `habits.target_count` added), and `SUM(done)` stays continuous with the old two-column era after a merge. Tap cycles the count with wrap (tap at full → 0); confetti fires only on the tap that reaches the target. New CLOCK-FILL dot: 0/N open ring, N/N solid ink dot, partial → open ring plus a clockwise pie wedge (count/target), all in the existing circle theme colours. "Day success" (`done >= target_count`) drives streaks, success-rate stats, and the staleness reminders' last-completed query, so a ×2 habit at 1/2 today is still stale-from-yesterday. New "Merge another column into this habit" action folds a second habit's per-date counts into the survivor (safety backup first) and deletes the absorbed column — the tool for retiring the old B¹/B² twin columns. REMOVE is now a hard delete (habit row + all its entries) so a removed column leaves no ghost on reload. Archive lock: months before the current one are read-only (circles, weights, and habit add/edit/remove disabled) with a quiet LOCKED tag; the gear menu's "Unlock this month" re-enables the viewed archive until you navigate away (per-browser, not persisted). Exercise view slims down: 3 set columns and 6 rows by default, "+ SET" reveals sets 4–5 (auto-shown when a row already has data there) and "add row" appends more.
